member.name: T:Acontplus.Barcode.Extensions.BarcodeServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering barcode services in the dependency injection container.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Barcode.Extensions.BarcodeServiceCollectionExtensions.AddBarcode(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers as a singleton in the service collection.
member.param: The service collection to add the service to.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Barcode.Interfaces.IBarcodeService
member.summary: Defines a contract for generating barcode and QR code images.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Barcode.Interfaces.IBarcodeService.Create(Acontplus.Barcode.Models.BarcodeConfig)
member.summary: Generates a barcode image as a byte array based on the supplied configuration.
member.param: The that controls format, size, colors, and encoding options.
member.returns: The raw bytes of the encoded image.
member.exception: Thrown when is null or empty.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Barcode.Models.BarcodeConfig.Text
member.summary: The text or data to encode into the barcode.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Barcode.Models.BarcodeConfig.Format
member.summary: The barcode format to generate. Defaults to .

member.name: P:Acontplus.Barcode.Models.BarcodeConfig.Width
member.summary: Width of the generated barcode image in pixels. Defaults to 300.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Barcode.Models.BarcodeConfig.Height
member.summary: Height of the generated barcode image in pixels. Defaults to 100.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Barcode.Models.BarcodeConfig.IncludeLabel
member.summary: Whether to render a human-readable text label beneath the barcode. Defaults to .

member.name: P:Acontplus.Barcode.Models.BarcodeConfig.Margin
member.summary: Quiet zone (margin) in pixels around the barcode. Defaults to 10.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Barcode.Models.BarcodeConfig.OutputFormat
member.summary: Output image encoding format. Defaults to .

member.name: P:Acontplus.Barcode.Models.BarcodeConfig.Quality
member.summary: Image quality for lossy formats such as JPEG (0–100). Defaults to 100.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Barcode.Models.BarcodeConfig.AdditionalOptions
member.summary: Additional format-specific encoding options (e.g. QR error correction level). Width, Height, Margin, and PureBarcode are always applied from the top-level properties and will override any values set here.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Barcode.Utils.BarcodeGen
member.summary: Provides static utility methods for generating barcodes and QR codes.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Barcode.Utils.BarcodeGen.Create(Acontplus.Barcode.Models.BarcodeConfig)
member.summary: Generates a barcode image as a byte array based on the supplied configuration.
member.param: The that controls format, size, colors, and encoding options.
member.returns: The raw bytes of the encoded image in the format specified by .
member.exception: Thrown when is null or empty.
